Name: Indicator icon
Description: The icon indicate the previous action is successes

Name: Description
Description: Describe what’s happening and what the user needs to know
Content Rules:
• Keep the message concise
• Stick with the past tense: e.g Success! You added your pinboards.
• Tone can be a little informal or emotive e.g Well done! You’re ready to share your chart.

Name: Link
Description: An action or a source link

Name: Close button
Description: This button allows the user to close the banner alert
Dynamic Behaviour: Clicking on the cross button can close the the banner alert

Name: Container
Dynamic Behaviour: The container length is based on the text length.
